Dear Ms./Mr. Hai, 
Thank you for taking the time to tell us about your experience at the Novotel Nha Trang.
I am sorry to see that your experience did not meet your expectations;
We sincerely apologize that there was a problem with your booking process. We hope you understand that this was an unexpected incident between the hotel's two websites and the page you operated on.
Immediately after discovering the technical error, our customer service department called the customer to notify them of the error. and then the problem was fixed. Unfortunately, the hotel had no more rooms that day so we could contact you again.
Our continuous improvement program is ongoing and your feedback helps us to focus on the areas where we can make an impact on the guest experience. Thank you for pointing out the different challenges where we should focus.

Kind regards,
Guest service team,

reviews.title: Not worth the money
reviews.positives: The room has good soundproofing, and the bed is comfortable.
reviews.negatives:
There were two things I disliked most about Novotel:

1. Terrible food: After checking in and while waiting until 2:00 PM for my room, I ate at the restaurant on the first floor. It was the worst pizza and sandwich I’ve ever had. The pizza crust was made from frozen dough and was rock hard; the sandwich was also tough, and the ingredients lacked flavor. I forgot to take a photo, but honestly, fast-food chains like Pizza Hut taste better. Considering how common high-quality Italian pizza, wood-fired pizza, or 4P’s pizza is in Vietnam now, it’s shocking that a chef at a 4-star hotel would serve such poor quality. This was the first thing that ruined my mood.

2. Lack of communication regarding beach services: Upon check-in, the receptionists failed to mention that the sunloungers on the beach in front of the hotel are only free from 7:00 AM to 4:00 PM.
When I went down to the beach at 4:05 PM, I saw umbrellas with the hotel logo and intended to sit down. A man approached me and rudely asked, 'How many chairs?' Thinking he was hotel staff, I said I needed two. He told me it would be 200k VND for two chairs; otherwise, I couldn't sit there.

Goodness, I felt like I was back in Vung Tau 20 years ago!!!!! I paid 3.5 million VND for a one-night stay mid-tour. It’s not that I can’t afford extra for services, but the experience was bizarre and talking to that man completely soured my mood.

If the hotel wants to provide loungers for guests, they should cover the cost for the entire day. If they can’t do that, they should just remove the chairs entirely.

reviews.title: Overall, it’s conveniently located for exploring the city, and the staff is friendly.
reviews.positives: The room has a great ocean view, and both the room and bathtub are spacious. After breakfast, the turn-down service is prompt, and the staff is friendly.
reviews.negatives: We tried the dinner buffet, but there weren’t many food options, and the freshness was somewhat lacking. Also, the swimming pool is small, and outside food is not allowed.

reviews.title: I didn't expect this level from Novotel.
reviews.text: I didn't expect it to be like this even though it's old. I thought it would just be a place to drop off my bags since my flight to Nha Trang was at night, but even so, the shower facilities are outdated and there's a gap in the floor. The bathroom and all the amenities in the room are worse than a motel level... I ran out of the room immediately. Even though it's old, for those of us who prefer cleanliness, it might feel a bit unsanitary. The corridor doesn't have air conditioning, and when lifting a suitcase into the room, there's a threshold at the door to get over. All the hotels in downtown Nha Trang are old, so there's nothing that can be done about that, but since I've only been at new accommodations, I might have felt it even more. The only good thing is the location. It's okay for those looking for cost-effectiveness, but it's best not to expect too much just because it's called Novotel or is a hotel.

reviews.title: Quite disappointed with the qualities
reviews.text: I booked king size bed which I did expect the real king size one, but apparently I got 2 single mattresses put together which light switch and plugs are in between those 2 mattresses (I couldn't find it for my first night because it was hidden from pillows, meaning I was sleeping on it). Food quality was also quite disappointed, expected much better croissant (it was just bread that looked like croissant), when I asked a staff about the coffee machine, she didn't even look at me and without any word but shouted to another staff to take care of me which was so rude of her. I tried buffet dinner, quality of food could be improved. I booked car to airport a night in advance, and they were 10 mins late and excused for bad traffic. I stayed at Ibis for my first 3 nights and Novotel for another 3 nights, I would say Ibis was much better in terms of staffs (both service mind and English level), quality of food especially breakfast, and bed which ibis gave me real king size mattress.

reviews.title: Didn't live up to other reviews / expectations
reviews.text:
This hotel was a let down for us.
* the pool was tiny and was east facing, therefore, never in the sun. Anyway the hotel closed it for maintenance when we were there.
* the sunbathing area was over the main drag which was exceedingly busy, on the beach. We were told that the Government dictated how many sun beds the hotel could have - 24 sun beds - for 180 rooms. Informed at check in that we could use hotel towels on other beach beds but would have to pay a nominal fee.
* there is a lot of construction work and building taking place next door and at the back of the hotel, so together with the traffic, the noise level was very high..
* the free wi-fi was sporadic
* the hotel front faces the beach but our balcony only had sun for 2 hours in the morning, in addition a metal grill ran up the left inside from the floor to the ceiling, approx a third of the way over, obscuring the view. This was cosmetic.
More positively
* the rooms themselves were clean, the hotel is only a few years old, although there is not much storage space
* the staff are very friendly
* the restaurant was very nice, bright and the food was well layed out.
reviews.positives: Friendly staff

reviews.text: overall, good hotel in terms of clean, well-sized rooms with lovely balcony and views in every room.  inconsistent service means staff is poorly trained to address standards typical of other hotels in its price range.  had to call several times to make sure rooms were cleaned before 4pm. there's really no private beach area or enough lounge chairs - this is deceiving from their website. end up getting charged for lounge chairs for a whole day - whether you use it for one hour or 8hours.  poor food quality and reception desks and restaurant service (in room and in the restaurant) is mediocre.  got charged higher prices for return trip to airport - just because we didnt book it at the same time as pickup.  receptionist just gives you the run-around and redirects you to the travel agent in the lobby. finally - you have to raise to upper management to get it resolved correctly - as the reception staff is typically ill-trained in vietnam.  same with room service - they dont put someone who can understand english or speak english well; which seems vital if you are ordering room service generally over the phone. some rooms have showers some rooms have baths - you need to specify during check-in, because they just dont tell you.

reviews.title: Not as expected
reviews.text:
The stay was relatively disappointing, especially after having read mostly fantastic reviews about the hotel, which led me to believe the hotel was the best choice for my 3 night stay in Nha Trang over Christmas.
Booked a Deluxe King room. Checked in around 230pm only for reception to tell me that they assigned a 6th floor room (total 18 floors) to me. Requested for a higher floor and was told that the hotel was pretty full and there were no more rooms. After a couple of disappointed remarks, a room suddenly was available on the 15th floor. Ok, fine...
In the room, everything looked great, then came the finer details.. The sunken in 'bathtub' looked dirty and not properly maintained. Wifi was weak and intermittent. The worse thing was that the hot water in the shower only lasted for a short time and the staff said they had to boil water?? to keep it hot??? So we had to wait for 15 minutes. And therefore the 'bathtub' was impractical and unuseable. Unbelievable.
Breakfast was ok. Few varieties and the same food everyday. But acceptable. What was unacceptable was that the staff cleaned and prepared a table for us, but I found that the fork they placed for me was used, unwashed and filled with food particles. Seriously?!
Most staff had lukewarm attitudes in my opinion, but they weren't unfriendly, impolite or anything to that extent. Just not what I expected.
Aside from the negatives, the hotel was pretty centrally located along the beach front with easy access to many restaurants. It also had a section of the beach closed off for its guests which was a good idea.
After reading so many 'amazing' reviews about this hotel, I was honestly disappointed with my stay. Perhaps it was an isolated incident, I wouldn't know. But I would probably try the Sheraton or Sunrise hotels if I were to go back to Nha Trang.
reviews.positives: Location, large room, ocean view

reviews.text:
Novotel is located across the road from it's private beach so very handy. The rooms are very large, we had an ocean view with balcony which was a really nice view (but can get very noisy when balcony windows are open!)

Main con for me was that they re-used the towels provided on the beach rather than provided new ones. 

Other downside for us was the delays with checkin. We arrived early and while we did expect not to be able to check-in until 2pm, we were told to check back at noon, then 1pm (but unable to get a room). Our room also changed three times in this time!

reviews.title: Started good, but ended bad
reviews.text:
Hello,

We stayed here for one night in Nha Trang and the staff was very welcoming to start with and stated that they upgraded our room to one of their bigger and nicest rooms; however, around 5pm there was very loud drilling for approximately one hour coming from just outside the bathroom on the exterior of the building and then again at 7am which woke us up and was very unpleasant. When we checked out we explained this to the manager and he stated that they have workers to stop the rain from getting into the room during this time of year. The manager then argued with us about the times we heard the drilling and said his staff would not have started that early. The manager did not offer us any sort of discount or anything at all for the inconvenience. Very displeased with the service from the manager. Do not recommend staying at this hotel. We stayed 3 nights and the Sheraton down the road for only 50 bucks Canadian more a night and it was so much better.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr. Gurminder,
Dear Guest,

Thank you for sharing your feedback. I’m truly sorry to hear about the issues you experienced during your stay, especially the disruption from the drilling noise. I understand how unsettling this must have been, and I apologize for the inconvenience it caused.

Regarding the noise and your interaction with the manager, I regret that we did not meet your expectations in addressing these concerns. We appreciate your comments and will use them to review and improve our service and communication.

We strive to provide a comfortable and pleasant experience for all our guests, and I’m sorry we fell short in this instance. If there’s anything else we can do to address your concerns or if you have further feedback, please feel free to contact us directly.

Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards,
Guest service team,

reviews.title: A cut ruined everything
reviews.text:
My family(6 adults and 3 children) began our one week Nha Trang trip at Novotel Hotel, but my baby boy got a deep cut on his left foot in the hotel swimming pool the first day we checked in . Though the hotel sent he to a hospital and payed for the medical treatment, but it did ruined our trip. I had to hug the little boy everywhere we went to, we canceled most of our activity outside and no more playing in water. 
Any way, thanks for Anna's kindly help. Wish Novotel Hotel can check the swing pool carefully and don't let this kind of issue happen again.
reviews.response:
Dear Zhiyan,
We do apologize for the bad experience happening during your stay at the hotel. We closed our pool for urgent maintenance and renovation for your information. We would like to send our best wishes to your son and hope he will get better soon. Your thanks will also be passed on to Anna. Thank you for sharing your feedback and we hope for another chance to regain your trust and bring you good  time in near future.
Kind regards,
Remi Faubel - General Manager

Although it was really my bad that I did not understand the hotel's rules,  the staff's rudeness and impatience did ruined my good mood.  No one would expect to be treated in the way by the staff of what a so-called highly rated hotel.  Anyway,  my family and I have had a good time in Nha Trang.  Thank you for this experience.

reviews.response:
Dear Paul,

Thank you for choosing our hotel and for sharing your valuable feedback.

We are delighted that you appreciated our central location and the stunning beach and bay views. However, we are truly sorry for the aspects of your stay that did not meet your expectations, especially regarding the quality of the breakfast and the condition of the rooms. Your comments are very important to us, and we are committed to making the necessary improvements to enhance our guests’ experience.

Your feedback is instrumental as we plan future renovations to restore our hotel to its full potential. We hope you will give us another opportunity to welcome you back and provide you with the exceptional stay you deserve.

Warm regards,
Guest service team,

reviews.title: The location is good.
reviews.text: The location is not bad. I was worried about checking in late, but I felt their kindness with a quick response. The accommodation provided a basic bed in a bunk bed room, which seems good for families with more than two kids or for friends to use it at a cheaper rate of 0.5. However, when I first entered, there was a musty smell and the toilet hadn't been cleaned for a long time, making it feel a bit dirty. If this issue is improved, it could be an even better hotel. Still, due to the good price, the location, the included breakfast, and the kindness I felt from most of the staff, it’s a great choice if you’re staying in downtown Nha Trang.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for taking the time to share your detailed feedback. We’re glad to hear that you appreciated our convenient location, quick responses during your late check-in, and the room setup that suited your family. It’s wonderful to know that our team’s friendliness made a positive impression on your stay.

However, we sincerely apologize for the issues you encountered with the room’s cleanliness. Your comments regarding the musty smell and the condition of the bathroom are concerning, and we will address these matters with our housekeeping team to ensure improvements are made.

We appreciate your understanding and are grateful for your suggestions. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back and provide an even better experience in the future.

Warm regards,
Guest Service Team
Novotel Nha Trang

Guest service team,

- Самый главный плюс – это расположение отеля, доступна вся инфраструктура вокруг
- Персонал достаточно приветлив и отзывчив — решил все возникающие неудобства 
- Номер был достаточно чистым и просторным
- Уборка каждый день, как положено
- Высокие потолки и просторная ванная комната
- Зона, где стоит унитаз — визуально закрыта от комнаты
- Симпатичный просторный балкон с хорошим видом
- Кондиционер работал исправно
- Воду приносили каждый день
- В ресторане можно заказать омлет на завтрак
- Есть своя небольшая бесплатная зона с лежаками на пляже
reviews.negatives:
- Ремонт в отеле доставлял дискомфорт, понимаю, что это временно, но при бронировании вас никто не предупредит. Лучше уточните перед бронью
- Чувствуется, что номера и мебель старые, при въезде присутствовал запах
- Чтобы открыть дверь в номер нужно приложить усилие, чтобы закрыть приходится хлопать
- Напротив лифтов на этажах есть открытое пространство с низкими перилами, выглядит небезопасно
- Никаких приветственных фруктов/конфет не предложили,  видимо так делают только для «статусных» гостей
- Собственная зона на пляже всего на 5 зонтиков и находится на второй линии, сотрудники на пляже дымят сигаретами и доставляют дискомфорт
- Выбор еды на завтраке больше заточен под азиатских гостей, мало что выбрать западному гостю
- Шум с дороги присутствует, спать не сильно мешал

reviews.title: Overpriced hotel on a good location
reviews.text: We found this hotel overpriced for what it has to offer. We got a good rate with Agoda but when you walk in you pay 3 times our price. It's definitely not worth this extreme high walk-in price. Our superior room on the 16th floor had a good full seaview. The room was large and comfortable. But the room had a connecting door which was not soundproof so we heard all the noice from our neighbours. The white carpet in the room had a lot of dirty stains which made the room look worn down. One day we had no Wifi in the room at all. This was a big miss for the price they ask. Even $10 hotels offer good working Wifi in the rooms. Like all Novotel's the put a lot of drinks and food in the room. They ask a extreme high price for this. On the positive side the breakfast was very good with a lot of western food and good quality.

reviews.title: Great views, poor service
reviews.text:
We chose to stay here in part because they had a relatively large, modern gym and pool on the first floor.  The pool was a bit small and shallow, but the gym was nice.  However, although it was supposed to open at 6 am (and we called them to remind them to open it up the night before), in fact it was not opened until 7 am.
The rooms were nice with wonderful views and the breakfast was fine (although not included in the room rate and relatively expensive), but with so many employees they should offer better service.  They did find a lost cell phone.  They also claim to have "wireless" in the rooms, but in fact there is one cable----which means that two people with laptops must take turns getting Internet access.  The lobby has 2 terminals which are nearly always in use, often by children.  And, yes, the hotel is full of children and families, probably because of its location.

reviews.title: Good service tainted by "Deposit Girl
reviews.text:
This hotel is fabulous. They provide just what you can expect from Novotel.  This hotel has a privately owned beach yard just 2 minutes away from your room where you can have a relaxed, romantic, peaceful moment enjoying nice food delivered from the hotel. 

Despite of all these good things, however, my holidays were not that pleasant simply because of one insolent reception ..  In check-in time this asked me to deposit some money for mini-bar saying it's a hotel policy. I used to stay in Novotel many times in different cities, but never heard about or experienced with such thing.  Obviously this bitch much worried that I will runaway without paying for the pepsi in the fridge.  I asked her to show me any such policy in written form. She mumbled with no confidence anymore and said she cannot find it right now.

 I'm not going to use this hotel again no matter how good facilities they have.
reviews.positives: fantastic location, astonishing sea view from the room, privately owned hotel beach yard,

reviews.title: Good hotel, spacious rooms, OK service
reviews.text:
as my second stay at novotel nha trang, i have to say that this time it met all my expectations despite being a bit lacking on the service side.  i got upsold at check-in on an ocean view room for an extra   per night, but it was well worth it.  rooms are large and spacious, washrooms are excellent (only complaint was that the hot water wasn't as hot as i prefer but then again i prefer it scalding hot!).

service was decent but not as good as it used to be.  concierge / bellboys weren't as prompt as they should be.  found myself waving down a taxi on multiple occasions. 

only minor complaint i have which i'm sitting on the fence about is their treatment of 'locals'.  my friend had a room booked and was checked in but they would be questioned almost everytime they entered the lobby.  just because you may look like a local doesn't mean they're not staying in the hotel and have to be questioned everytime you enter / exit the lobby area!

We experienced a confrontation when the beach staff sat us in the shade of an umbrella & returning guests accused us of stealing their shade 2 hours later.

reviews.title: Great Location!
reviews.text: The hotel is located right by the beach, just cross the road for public beach access. While checking in, it might be worth asking for an upgrade (our room was not ready when we arrived and they upgraded us to the a better room - higher up, bigger room). Most rooms have a balcony, with great views on the coastline. About 5 mins walk to the main nightlife, restaurants, shops, etc. They also have a tour desk, to book snorkeling, diving or other tours - prices are ok but worth checking with diving and tour shops in the area. Bike rental also available (again, check outside for better deals). Gym is average size, steam room and sauna good but setting is average (changing room, showers and steam room/sauna all in one room). Free internet is available in the lobby, but there are only two computers - sometimes you have to wait a long time for other people to finish browsing and playing games. The night staff is not very helpful, impossible to speak to anyone (staff was refusing to speak English, not a 4star hotel standard).
reviews.positives: Close to nightlife, restaurants and diving shops. Clean, comfortable, spacious rooms, some have a great view on the beach! Offers all basic amenities, plus free internet access, gym, spa, sauna, steam room.
reviews.negatives: More a 'business-like' atmosphere, rather than a resort. The swimming pool is tiny!

reviews.title: Great Stay
reviews.text:
The staff was friendly and nice especially the doorman. Props to the guy, he was amazing. 

The hotel was doing renovation so it was not the prettiest looking once you get to the floor. After walking in, you can tell the room needed renovation but the view was amazing as I was facing the sea. The room was clean, there were some mold in the bathroom and the furnishing was quite old. Breakfast was great but I feel like they keep running out of food. I think they need to get a new coffee machine where the guest can make it themselves as the server need to make the coffee. The viet coffee was not self-serve and had to find a server to make it. 

Towels is available for free for guests heading to the beach and seats with umbrella are available but they are usually packed.
reviews.response:
Dear Andy,

Thank you for sharing your experience with us and for choosing Novotel Nha Trang.
We’re glad to hear that you had a great stay and appreciated the friendliness of our staff — especially our doorman, who will be delighted to receive your kind words!

We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience caused by the ongoing renovation. While we are working to enhance our facilities, we understand that it may affect the visual impression on some floors. Your feedback regarding the room condition and bathroom cleanliness has been shared with our housekeeping and maintenance teams for immediate attention.

We also appreciate your suggestions about breakfast service and the coffee station. We’re currently reviewing ways to improve guest convenience, including the possibility of adding a self-service coffee option.

Thank you again for your valuable feedback. We hope to welcome you back soon for an even better experience.

Warm regards,
Guest Service Team

reviews.text:
Travel alone and took the airport bus to Nha Trang. The bus stopped near the Citadines. And just within 5 mins walk to Novotel.

I stayed in the standard room. The room view is good. It was clean and lots of space.

Waiting time for check in and check out were acceptable.

The only concern I had was I bought a SIM card and wished to register for the Vietnam taxi app, so I can easily estimate fare and reserve a taxi and no need to deal with the driver on spot.

However, I was not possible to get the OTP (one time password) via SMS, so I seek help from the front staff.

He seems not too understand (I showed him in Vietnamese). The count down used to resend if I cannot receive any SMS. 

The staff kept asking me to wait until it finished and told me it will come at the end. Then, he repeated the step.

I expected local can help but I gave up finally.

Stayed on 22-25 Dec 2017. The room's ocean view is spectacular and because it's a corner unit, I get the awesome coastal view as well. 
Here's some of the cons :
It's extremely windy during my stay. The whirling sound managed to sipped through the door gaps resulting in sleepless nights. The big bathroom has a tub which I don't know how it suits the purpose. It's too small to swim and too big to soak in. 
I paid something like usd400 for 3N and the laundry bag and slipper are not even complimentary. 
The bonus: 
Staffs are friendly and warm

reviews.title: Nice, centrally located hotel opposite beach
reviews.text:
The Novotel was an affordable option right across from the beach, affording great views of the coastline. Staff were attentive though did endlessly drag me around rooms trying to make me upgrade when I'd clearly said my room was fine. Food was nice enough, but restaurants full of screaming children (not really the hotels' fault obviously) so went elsewhere after one meal. Rooms are definitely comfy, well designed (especially the funky bathrooms and soft rugs) and the balconies even in side rooms had a diagonal view of the ocean.

Was not a massive fan of Nha Trang itself as it offers very little atmosphere and is very touristy/resorty rather than the relaxed beach/backpacker vibe I prefer. Huge Russian influence in town and very little Vietnamese feel to the place whatsoever.
reviews.positives: Location, comfy room, great view

reviews.title: very enjoyable

reviews.text:

The beach view was great and balcony was spacious as well. The morning buffet had a good rangewith mix western and eastern food.

The room was a good size and the the sunken area with lounge chair looked very nice too.

The room was tidied consistently and to a good standard.

reviews.text: Had a 2 night stay at novotel Nha Trang, the stay was fantastic with great view of the blue sea right from the balcony of the rooms. The room is huge with a huge bath tub, everything is there need for the stay. The best part of the room is right beside the bed, there a sliding door which you can have a full view of the bath room through this glass panel.

reviews.title: Very nice hotel, Very friendly staff
reviews.text:
My grips: The room was not as clean as expected. There was a large stain in the carpet and it just wasn't 100% clean as it the room was slight older. I got a Superior room. The other thing was the KING sized bed, Which really was 2 twin beds put together. This was terrible as we were unable to sleep in the middle of the bed because of the edges of the 2 beds put together. The pool is awfully small.

My complements: Very friendly staff with a smile the whole time, Location was wonderful. The lobby was very relaxing. View of the beach was exquisite and the balcony was decent.

As long as you don't expect the Shangri-La, this hotel should be good enough for most travelers.

reviews.title: Excellent hotel and great location
reviews.text:
We stayed in Novotel Nha Trang for 3 days and we are totally happy. Arrived at 01:45 and our Standard Room was not ready yet. They offer me and upgrade to Deluxe in level 18. It was worth to upgrade. Room are beautiful and excellent view. Love the bathroom design. Bed are comfortable: we require 1 double bed but actually this is 2 single bed together. But this was not a big deal.

Staff are very friendly: reception, beach service staff, security, etc. Especially beach service staff are super friendly and kind. 

We tried Spa in level 3: spa is free (swimming pool as well) and massage price is a bit high compare to another spa around. They did massage quite well.

Breakfast was very good, lots of choices.

In overall we are happy with Novotel Nha Trang. We will come back next time and strongly recommened

reviews.title: Lovely staff, great location, pop w.groups
reviews.text:
Pls read to the end. We arrived in the evening at the airport and though we pre-booked a car there wasn't anyone to pick us up. We called the hotel and the admitted to their mistake and asked us to get in to a taxi and they pay the fee. We thought that that would be our compensation and that's it. 
In our room was a lovely fruit bowl w. a card to congratulate us on our anniversary. The room was large nicely decorated comfortable bed and clean w. a side view of the ocean. 
The following morning at breakfast the Front office manager came apologised and offered us a dinner or spa treatment for 2. Our stay at this hotel was very good! The staff was very pleasant and professional going beyond our expectation which are not low. 
The only thing we found irritating is the beach beds situation. The hotel has limited beds and groups of a certain nationality come around 7am everyday and hog them rotating shifts going for breakfast and other meals so other guests have to ether pay or sit on the sand. Not the hotel fault as such but still... 
Other hotel notes- Breakfast could be improved and concierge service wasn't helpfull or knoledgeble, we asked about bicycle rent and the girl told us to look around in the street. ??? 
Though the hotel is clean some soft furnishing upgrades are required. 
We highly recommend this hotel!
reviews.positives: Great service

reviews.title: Great location and view of beach
reviews.text: Hotel is great and rooms were clean n roomy. Only thing I didn't like was the Internet. Somehow, the Internet in the lobby was blazing fast but in the rooms it's terrible. My other traveler reported the same thing. If this hotel had fast Internet in the room I give this a top notch hotel.
reviews.positives: Beautiful Large rooms w balcony. Great selection of food at breakfast

reviews.title: Good location, great balcony facing the sea.
reviews.text:
The Novotel is located in the southern side along the seashore in Nha Trang, very close the the tourist ghetto. I usually dislike such ghettos, but in Nha Trang, you will find this little ghetto provides lot of restaurant, coffee, sightseeing, and hotels. If you book into Sheraton on the northern side of the seashore, it is more upmarket, but the surrounding area is quite dead. But in a few years, there will be lot of new things there too.

Novotel provides large rooms with seaview, and a lovely balcony for sitting reading. I enjoyed tremendously sitting on the balcony. The toilet is large with both a bath and shower. But the shower drainage is not working properly, so you will likely to get wet on the floor. The water pressure can be low some time. But in general the water temperature is stable. The room is well maintained, but one night I felt some toilet odor coming out of the AD fan. I changed the fan speed and never noticed the odor again. The beds are very comfortable. And the AC does not blow cold air onto the bed, reducing the chance of getting a cold. The wifi is not strong in the room, that is really a pity. But they do provide a internet cable for laptop connection. We were upgraded to a deluxe room with balcony windows facing two sides, which was truly gorgeous. Living on high floor, there is no problem with mosquitoes. The best time for visiting Nha Trang is March, so when we were there in Christmas New Year period, it was still rain season, windy cloudy. The sea was not good for swimming. But March is warmer calmer.
reviews.positives: Location, room, spa

reviews.title: I had to wait more than 30 minutes to check in.
reviews.text: I had great holiday in Novotel. I book 1 kingsize bed but it was 2 single bed put together so it was not comfortable for 2 people. Anyway, I will come back Novotel again because staffs were helpful and hotel was clean.

Breakfast buffet is very delicious and large variety.
The drinks in the lobby lounge are good, too. Most of the time offer special offer, buy one get one free or buy two get 1 free... etc.

reviews.title: New and stylish
reviews.text:
This is probably the best business hotel you can find in Nha Trang. If you're here for business instead of leisure, Novotel is no doubt the best choice.

The location is good, only a short walk to the small night market, where you can find some food and souvenirs to buy. The view is great, you can see the beach at your balcony.

When checking out, numerous people were congested at the front desk, trying to leave soon and catch the very early flight. However, the staff were unable to speed up the process. Each customer took about 10 minutes to check out. Chaotic.
reviews.positives: View
reviews.negatives: Checking out is a chaos

reviews.title: Good location, pricey but really nice.
reviews.text:
The hotel is located close enough to walk to everything but just outside so it's quiet. The views from the front rooms are great (I'm not sure if they have rear rooms). The rooms are clean, comfartable and large. The shower is great, you have to see it. We felt it was expensive but seeing some of the othrs around nha trang it was worth it. We didn't gt breakfast included, there is a great place 100 yards out of the hotel on the right that's cheap and good for food.
The apple macs provide the Internet service free of charge in the lobby as well as free wifi, but no wifi inthe rooms. Downside was the pool, it looks like it would never be in the sun, but as it rained when we where there that wasn't an issue. The hotel also has it's own stretch of beach over the road.
reviews.positives: Views from the balcony, the shower, cleanliness of the rooms,   Spa treatments.
reviews.negatives: Cost, lobby bar cost.

reviews.title: convenient and confortable
reviews.text:
At first we could say that we enjoyed this hotel.
This hotel is really good location and has nice view from each rooms. 
(same as another reviews, the front desk offered upgrade room, but we stayed a standard room coz we satisfied it)

Additional charged breakfast was so tasty. We liked their Pho. It's quite pricy in Vietnam, tho.

The staff was really helpful.
We could  go to good spa and restaurant which the staff suggested us. 

The bath was super clean, but it limited hot water unfortunately.
When we took shower continuously, the water was cold at last.
reviews.positives: location, comfortable room, breakfast
reviews.negatives: bathroom, chilly outside pool

reviews.title: novotel nha trang
reviews.text: The service and room were excellent. The views were fantastic, however ther was a nice sunken bath in the room with not enough hot water to fill it, also the shower ran cold after a few minutes which was very disappointing. Also this was a problem with two people wanting to have two consecutive showers so the plumbing needs attending to.
reviews.positives: nice views and room
reviews.negatives: not enough hot water in the tank to fill the bath

reviews.title: Novoytel Nha Trang
reviews.text: I had a very enjoyable stay at the Novotel in Nha Trang recently. The hotel is is very clean, comfortable and very good customer service. The only down side to the hotel is that it is not very attractive from the outside, but inside is eveything one would expect from a 4/5 star hotel. The rooms are lovely and big with great views of the beach and the added extras like good pool, gym and spa and very welcome.
reviews.positives: Pool, restaurant, room, view from room of beach, customer service, free internet, gym, spa
reviews.negatives: hotel design from outside, room service

reviews.title: Novotel Nha Trang
reviews.text: good value for money ,well situated on the main road across from the beach giving excellent views of the sea.very clean and nice rooms with lots of space. Nice gym and small swimming pool.Didnt have breakfast as £11 bit much when we got all we needed at a local cafe for $3 each.Would stay there again.
reviews.positives: Good value hotel with sea views excellent buffet for $16. v helpfull staff. Bar staff speak good English and were very helpfull.
reviews.negatives: Noisey guests in the restraunt and some kids running around jumping on chairs but the staff dint say anything not nice when you are trying to enjoy your meal.

reviews.title: Expensive but satisfied...
reviews.text:
All rooms with beach front view, in room free Wifi access, spacious and beautifully decorated. The beach is just across the street and within walking distance to major hotels, bars and clubs.
Lunch & Dinner buffet is fairly good but little pricey and service is slow. Wish that the swimming pool could be much bigger. Nice lounge area to relax. Front desk service quite efficient.
reviews.positives: New, modern, beach front view.
reviews.negatives: swimming pool is too small!

reviews.title: good hotel
reviews.text: The hotel is located just near the sea and every room has ocean view. The room has a nice interior design. Free wireless interent service. The staffs were well trained. Yet the only thing I did not like was there was no bathtub in the room, which I had not expected. But in general I was quite sateisfied with the hotel.
reviews.positives: the best location, nice sea view, good staff service
reviews.negatives: need bathtub

reviews.title: Nice new hotel
reviews.text: We got a standard room with view.  Room's size was ok, layout was nice.  Staff was very nice, especially the porters, very attentive.  Breakfast and dinner were ok, reasonable price.  Bar drinks were not so good.  I ordered a margarita and didn't taste much of the alcohol.   Overall it's a nice hotel.  I will stay there again if I will get the package deal, if not, there are better hotel with better value.
reviews.positives: Everything is new, clean.  Staff is nice, tried hard to please guests.  Room's layout is nice, good view.
reviews.negatives: Pool is small.  Spa offers no full body massage.

reviews.title: Novotel Nha Trang
reviews.text: The hotel frontage is not big and clear enough to attract the tourists but the room is fantastic with modern design, with LCD screen, nice and big bathroom. We think it will have more value if there are more food for the Breakfast to attract the tourist. When booking, somehow our booking did not include the breakfast, we have to pay for but we don't think its worth the value yet. Other than that staff are friendly, helpful.
reviews.positives: Modern design room, clean and sea view, very comfortable stay.
reviews.negatives: A few steps before entering the room which can be dangerous and we all missed the steps! I wonder who design these steps should think about the safety. I requested the reception to put the sign to remind the steps but I don't think it is enough to prevent the incident, please reconsider and improve this important issue.

reviews.title: Utility services that meet the needs
reviews.text: Convenient location, good service quality according to the standards advertised by the hotel.
reviews.response:
Kính gửi Quyen,
Cảm ơn quý khách đã chia sẻ đánh giá. Chúng tôi rất trân trọng sự tin tưởng và hài lòng của quý khách đối với dịch vụ và chất lượng tại khách sạn. Sự thoải mái và tiện ích luôn là ưu tiên hàng đầu của chúng tôi, và phản hồi tích cực của quý khách là nguồn động lực lớn để tiếp tục nâng cao trải nghiệm cho khách hàng. reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: All good

reviews.title: The pros and cons are clear.
reviews.text: On the first day, due to a flight delay, we checked in late at 4 AM. However, the assigned room was damp, and the bathroom door was broken and wouldn't open. In the afternoon, we were assigned to a different floor, and we stayed for two more days. On the last day of check-out, the hairdryer was broken and didn't work. The advantages are that it is located in front of Nha Trang Beach and the kindness of the staff. However, the disadvantages are the aging facilities and the locally inspired food. I went with my parents, and there wasn't much to eat for breakfast, so they only had salad, braised short ribs, and rice. The bathroom was large, like a bathhouse, but it didn't particularly stand out as a benefit, and I don't think it's good in terms of value for money.

reviews.title: Ks has a nice location.
reviews.text: The hotel has a beautiful location and enthusiastic, attentive staff. However, the breakfast is not diverse and the menu does not change on different days. The staff in the dining area are not attentive and the cleaning is slow, so the tables used by previous guests are not cleared. Guests arriving later have no place to sit and must sit at tables that have already been used, with dirty dishes not cleaned up, which is very inconvenient.

reviews.text: We stayed at Novotel for 3 nights and it was perfect. Located at the center of Nhatrang so it was super easy to reach tourist attractions. Besides, it has gym club with free entrance and free breakfast.
